articles.title: Signs grow that Starmer will set out timetable to resign as mood in government shifts

articles.title: US-Iran talks to begin in Switzerland as Tehran says it closed Strait of Hormuz
articles.description: The US disputed Iran's claim the waterway is shut, a move Tehran says was a response to Israeli attacks in Lebanon.

articles.title: Extreme heat warning expanded as 37C heatwave approaches UK
articles.description: After a slightly cooler Saturday, temperatures will rise again, possibly touching 36C by Tuesday with a Met Office amber extreme heat warning set to come into force.
